name: Oana Goga

work.note: Official CNRS-affiliated institutional CV identifies her as a CNRS-affiliated researcher.

tracking.note: Official institutional CV provides explicit undergraduate, master's, doctoral, advisor, and postdoctoral lineage.

sources.note: Ranking page provides a DBLP author id and a current affiliation, but no lineage details.

The official institutional CV lists `Ph.D. in Computer Science, Université Pierre et Marie Curie (UPMC), May 2014`; advisor `Renata Teixeira`; `M.Sc. in Computer Networks, UPMC, September 2010`; advisor `Renata Teixeira`; `Engineering Degree in Computer Science, Technical University of Cluj-Napoca, September 2008`; advisors `Jérôme Gallard, Adrien Lèbre, Christine Morin, and Vasile Dadarlat`; and `Postdoctoral researcher at MPI-SWS, June 2014 to September 2017`; advisor `Krishna P. Gummadi`.

summary: The official institutional CV states that Oana Goga earned an engineering degree in Computer Science from the Technical University of Cluj-Napoca, an M.Sc. in Computer Networks from UPMC advised by Renata Teixeira, a PhD in Computer Science from UPMC also advised by Renata Teixeira, and later held a postdoc at MPI-SWS with Krishna P. Gummadi.

undergraduate.note: The official institutional CV lists `Engineering Degree in Computer Science, Technical University of Cluj-Napoca, September 2008`.

masters.note: The official institutional CV lists `M.Sc. in Computer Networks, UPMC, September 2010` and names advisor `Renata Teixeira`.

phd.note: The official institutional CV lists `Ph.D. in Computer Science, Université Pierre et Marie Curie (UPMC), May 2014` and names advisor `Renata Teixeira`.

postdoc.note: The official institutional CV lists `Postdoctoral researcher at MPI-SWS, June 2014 to September 2017` and names advisor `Krishna P. Gummadi`.

name: Oguzhan Ersoy

work.note: The official TU Delft dissertation PDF identifies him as a TU Delft researcher.

tracking.note: Official TU Delft dissertation PDF provides explicit master's, dual-bachelor, doctoral advisor, and postdoctoral history.

sources.note: Ranking page provides a DBLP author id and a current affiliation, but no lineage details.

The official TU Delft dissertation PDF states that Oguzhan Ersoy earned an M.Sc. in Electrical & Electronics Engineering from Boğaziçi University, dual B.Sc. honour degrees in Electrical & Electronics Engineering and Mathematics, completed PhD work under R.L. summary: The official TU Delft dissertation PDF states that Oguzhan Ersoy earned an M.Sc. in Electrical & Electronics Engineering from Boğaziçi University, dual B.Sc. honour degrees, completed PhD work under R.L. Lagendijk and Z. Erkin, and later was a post-doctoral researcher at TU Delft.

undergraduate.note: The official TU Delft dissertation PDF states that Oguzhan Ersoy earned `B.Sc. honor degrees in Electrical & Electronics Engineering and Mathematics in 2012`, but the reviewed extract does not restate the granting institution.

masters.note: The official TU Delft dissertation PDF states that Oguzhan Ersoy earned a `Master of Science in Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Boğaziçi University, Turkey`.

phd.note: The official TU Delft dissertation PDF states that Oguzhan Ersoy's `PhD work` was under the supervision of Prof.dr.ir. R.L. Lagendijk and Dr. Z. Erkin.

postdoc.note: The official TU Delft dissertation PDF states that Oguzhan Ersoy was a `post-doctoral researcher in the Distributed Systems Group of Delft University of Technology`.
